design_philosophy: A command-center sports analytics dashboard. High-contrast data presentation, tight grid structures, and clear visual hierarchy for fast decision making. Embraces a sleek, tactical 'Control Room' feel suitable for high-intensity sports betting tools.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase

layout.spacing_scale: Dense and tactical. Use p-4 to p-6 for analytical cards, gap-4 or gap-6 for grids to maintain data proximity.
layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look) - Flat backgrounds with 1px subtle borders (border-white/10). No soft shadows, use sharp 1px strokes. Use 'rounded-md' sparingly, keep edges sharp.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF5A00] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-6 py-3 rounded hover:bg-[#E04F00] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-6 py-3 rounded hover:border-white/40 hover:bg-white/5 transition-all

tabs.base: flex space-x-2 border-b border-white/10 w-full overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar
tabs.tab: px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold uppercase text-neutral-400 hover:text-white transition-colors whitespace-nowrap

odds_indicator.likely: text-[#00E676] bg-[#00E676]/10 px-2 py-1 rounded text-sm font-bold border border-[#00E676]/20
odds_indicator.unlikely: text-[#FF3B30] bg-[#FF3B30]/10 px-2 py-1 rounded text-sm font-bold border border-[#FF3B30]/20

motion.hover: Subtle background lightening and border opacity increase.
motion.loading: Use an ASCII-style retro-tech loader or a pulsing structural skeleton. For 'Atualizar análise', button should show a spinner and text 'Buscando Flashscore...'
motion.transitions: All interactive elements should have transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out.

image_urls.description: Dark abstract geometric background with subtle glowing lines for the main layout/hero section.
Dark night stadium background for the Match Analysis Header overlay.
Minimalist soccer ball on dark turf. Can be used for empty states or generic sports placeholders.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images uses a bg-black/60 to bg-black/80 overlay to maintain a 4.5:1 ratio. High legibility is critical.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='update-analysis-btn').

icons.usage: Use sharp, duotone, or bold weights for sports data metrics (e.g., Target, ChartLineUp, SoccerBall). Do not use soft rounded icons.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a dark-mode hybrid fullstack app using React, Tailwind, and Shadcn UI. Implement the 'Control Room' dense grid design pattern.
instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Import 'Barlow Condensed' and 'DM Sans' from Google Fonts in index.html or global css. Install @phosphor-icons/react.
instructions_to_main_agent.routing: Create a main rounds listing page, and a detailed match analysis page.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_fetching: Implement loading states during 'Flashscore scraping'. Show a loading skeleton while calculating fair odds.
instructions_to_main_agent.odds_logic: For each match, calculate: (favorable_events / total_matches) * 100 = percentage. Fair odd = 100 / percentage.
ui_specifics: 1. Round 17 must have a distinct 'Próxima' (Next) badge in the rounds list.
2. The Match Analysis Header must use the stadium night image with a dark overlay (bg-black/60 to /80).
3. Odds cards must clearly show high/unlikely (Red) and low/likely (Green) using the odds_indicator styles.
4. Do NOT use generic inter font; use Barlow Condensed for numbers and headings to give a sports/athletic feel.
5. Use 'Bento' or 'Control Room' grid for the statistical breakdown (Home wins, Away losses, H2H).
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: CRITICAL: Add data-testid attributes to all tabs, match cards, odds containers, and the update button.
